title: Mayor Owens will appeal ruling exempting Syracuse University from taxes on student center
summary: Mayor Owens and city lawmakers are pursuing a legal appeal of a ruling that exempts Syracuse University from property taxes on its student center facility. This tax revenue dispute involves the city's Law Department and represents an ongoing intergovernmental conflict over institutional tax obligations.

political_signal.description: City administration formally opposing tax exemption ruling; escalating legal challenge indicates budgetary priority around institutional tax obligations and revenue recovery.

processing_notes: Article date is 2026 (future-dated); confirms Law Department involvement; no dollar amounts specified in content; Jeremy Boyer is reporter, not decision-maker; 'appeal' indicates continuation of existing dispute rather than new initiative
